tasks.subject: Task 0: Config + secrets wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Load .env into a validated ValidationConfig that fails loud on missing creds; finalize .gitignore so .env is ignored and .env.example tracked.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/validation/test_config.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/validation/config.py", "src/sverdrup/validation/__init__.py", "tests/validation/test_config.py", ".gitignore"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/validation/test_config.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": [".env ignored, .env.example tracked", "fail-loud on empty creds under thredds/ftp", "empty creds allowed under meom_mirror"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Vendor submodule + their-eval de-risk spike
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.**

**Goal:** Pin challenge repo as submodule at the leaderboard-matching commit, import their scoring function, run on their own shipped BASELINE map, reproduce all three published numbers (mu 0.85 / sigma 0.09 / lambda_x 140).

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/validation/test_their_eval_spike.py -v -m external

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/validation/their_eval.py", "tests/validation/test_their_eval_spike.py", ".gitmodules", "docs/validation/parameter_audit_trail.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/validation/test_their_eval_spike.py -v -m external", "acceptanceCriteria": ["submodule pinned to leaderboard-matching commit, SHA recorded", "score() returns (mu,sigma,lambda_x)", "reproduces published mu 0.85 / sigma 0.09 / lambda_x 140 from their own BASELINE map", "SHA + numbers in audit trail"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["mu"], ["sigma"], ["lambda_x"]], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Access adapter + live smoke test
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.**

**Goal:** Verify the live THREDDS catalog URL + auth mechanism; fetch one small remote NetCDF and confirm it reads.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/validation/test_access.py -v + captured live smoke read

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/validation/access.py", "tests/validation/test_access.py", "docs/validation/parameter_audit_trail.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/validation/test_access.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["live catalog URL resolves; auth mechanism recorded", "fetch downloads + opens one remote NetCDF", "retry transient-only; 401 surfaces clearly"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Parameter extraction + audit trail
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.**

**Goal:** Read baseline_oi.ipynb in full; extract every OI param; resolve SLA-vs-SSH/MDT reference frame explicitly; produce the audit trail; baseline_config() accepted by OI.solve.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/validation/test_params.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/validation/params.py", "tests/validation/test_params.py", "docs/validation/parameter_audit_trail.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/validation/test_params.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["every OI param extracted with cell/line source", "audit trail maps value->notebook->our setting", "SLA-vs-SSH/MDT reference frame stated explicitly", "baseline_config() accepted by OI.solve; OBS_NOISE_VARIANCE exposed"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Input adapter — five missions to ObsWindow, Cryosat-2 held out
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Five-mission L3 -> ObsWindow (per-obs noise in DiagonalErrorModel); Cryosat-2 -> separate EvalTrack; spin-up included; reference-frame handling per audit trail.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/validation/test_input_adapter.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/validation/input_adapter.py", "tests/validation/test_input_adapter.py", "tests/validation/conftest.py", "tests/validation/fixtures"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/validation/test_input_adapter.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["mapping ObsWindow contains only the five missions, never Cryosat-2", "Cryosat-2 loaded as separate eval-only EvalTrack", "spin-up obs in mapping window; eval track 2017-only", "loaded quantity matches audit-trail reference frame"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Output adapter — OI map to challenge NetCDF schema
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.**

**Goal:** Write our OI map to NetCDF matching OSE_ssh_mapping_BASELINE.nc field-for-field; round-trips through their_eval.score.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/validation/test_output_adapter.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/validation/output_adapter.py", "tests/validation/test_output_adapter.py", "tests/validation/fixtures"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/validation/test_output_adapter.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["output NetCDF matches BASELINE schema field-for-field (dims/coords/var/units/time/fill)", "file round-trips through their_eval.score unchanged"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Run driver — 2017 single-tile OI to daily maps to NetCDF
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drive OI over 2017 single tile with a sliding temporal window; assemble daily map stack; write through output adapter.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/validation/test_run.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/validation/run.py", "tests/validation/test_run.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/validation/test_run.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["run_year emits one map per output day over 2017", "each day's solve windowed to +/-temporal_half_window_days; spin-up feeds early days", "fixture run completes and output is schema-valid"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Dual evaluation + result report — the BASELINE result
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.**

**Goal:** Full 2017 OI; their eval on our map AND shipped BASELINE map (three-number sanity anchor, lambda_x flagged); our area_weighted_rmse cross-check; RESULT.md table + decomposed read.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/validation/test_report.py -v + captured RESULT.md

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/sverdrup/validation/report.py", "tests/validation/test_report.py", "docs/validation/RESULT.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/validation/test_report.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["their eval on our map AND shipped BASELINE; sanity anchor reproduces published mu/sigma/lambda_x with lambda_x flagged", "our area_weighted_rmse on same map; delta reported", "RESULT.md has table + sanity number + parallel-eval delta + decomposed read", "no tolerance loosened; PASS tolerance stated as recorded"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["ours", "our-map"], ["baseline", "their-map"]], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
